---

## Description
I copied the assigned exercise as instructed and created a new repository. The "Copy exercise" button was supposed to turn into a "Start exercise" button when the new repository was created, but it did not.

## Commit
Initial commit (e5d468b)

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Copied the exercise using the "Copy Exercise" button
2. Created new repository
3. Expected "Start exercise" button to appear
